title: ItemName
description: Lets you change the name of a item with a simple command with custom colors, and formatting
body:
# /Name Plugin ✍️
**Lets you change the name of a item with a simple command also adding formatting options to change color, boldness, font, etc 💣**

_to find all color codes you can check here: 🕸️_
**https://minecraft.fandom.com/wiki/Formatting_codes**

**also you are able to do some simple colors like <red> <bold> etc**


supports minimessage for gradients
